case_title: DINA M LIVERANT VS. GREG HEWITT

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIVERANT, DINA M YRUSTEE OF THE DINA M. LIVERANT REVOCABLE TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT HEWITT, GREG SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF DINA LIVERANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED; NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT WERE SUBMITTED FOR THE COURT'S CONSIDERATION. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIVERANT, DINA M YRUSTEE OF THE DINA M. LIVERANT REVOCABLE TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEWITT, GREG THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2867 SACRAMENTO ST., #3, S.
